summary: Phase 5 wrap-up cold verification. All 9 wrap-up tests pass, phase5 regression (17 passed + 1 skipped) unchanged. OpenAPI shows 132 endpoints (>=125) and includes all required paths.
critical_code_review_comments: admin_routes.py dev-backdate: inline `import os as _os`, datetime, bson, database inside handler — fine, but could be module-level for consistency. Not blocking.

dev-backdate stores created_at/updated_at as ISO strings via update_one but the created_at was likely originally a datetime — mixed types across documents may need normalization elsewhere; existing services already tolerate both, so no action needed for this wrap-up.
test_credentials: Admin phone 9999999999 via dev OTP; fresh vendor phones generated per run.
seed_data_creation: TEST_NudgeVendor_* user and TEST_NudgeFlow_* listing created per run — prefix keeps them identifiable.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 5 wrap-up complete. /api/openapi.json has 132 endpoints. New admin endpoints POST /api/v1/admin/nudge/scan and POST /api/v1/admin/listings/{id}/dev-backdate verified: admin gate (403), dev-mode gate (currently open — all *_DEV_MODE true), days clamp (0->1, 999->365), 400 for bad ObjectId, 404 for unknown listing, full nudge flow (backdate->scan->boost_nudge notification with open_boost=1 action_url->unread count increments), and 7-day cooldown idempotency (2nd scan returns nudged_count=0).
